Result: 在55筆樣本架構壓力測試中，無GCD路徑達100%架構通過率，中位數延遲降低34%。在n=10正式保留集上，無GCD推論路徑BERTScore F1=0.779，超越GPT-5.4（0.726）、DeepSeek-V3.2（0.703）、Gemini-3-Flash-Preview（0.703）及Llama-4-Maverick（0.700）等零樣本基準，且完全本地氣隙推論。

Conclusion: 本系統填補了繁體中文特殊教育NLP的空白，提供了一個可擴展、保護隱私的本地推論解決方案，並在工業工程範式下驗證了低資源微調的有效性，同時揭示GCD在繁體中文token預算下不具優勢的意外發現。

Abstract: Writing Individualized Education Programs (IEPs) is a high-labor, knowledge-intensive document burden; English-language research has demonstrated that generative AI can significantly reduce drafting time, yet automated IEP generation in Traditional Chinese remains virtually unexplored due to domain data scarcity, strict privacy regulations, and the absence of local evaluation benchmarks. We propose a low-resource fine-tuning pipeline centered on Corpus-Grounded Feature Diffusion (CGFD): (1) 25 dual-expert high-score seed transcripts are selected via a tau threshold with flag-aware score caps; (2) a FeatureProfile (sentence length, structure, quantification templates) is extracted from seeds and injected into LLM prompts alongside Verbalized-Sampling-style diversity control to drive diffusion; (3) 15 expert gold seeds are used as diffusion anchors, targeting 585 samples; 567 valid diffusion samples are obtained, yielding a 582-sample training set used to fine-tune Breeze-7B with QLoRA; (4) schema-constrained inference via Grammar-Constrained Decoding (GCD) enforces a hierarchical SMART Goal Ladder schema at inference time. Ablation results on a 55-sample schema stress set reveal an unexpected finding: GCD is counterproductive under Traditional Chinese token budgets -- the no-GCD path achieves 100% schema pass rate at 34% lower median latency, outperforming GCD on both reliability and speed. On the n=10 formal hold-out, the no-GCD inference path achieves BERTScore F1 = 0.779, exceeding GPT-5.4 (0.726), DeepSeek-V3.2 (0.703), Gemini-3-Flash-Preview (0.703), and Llama-4-Maverick (0.700) zero-shot baselines while maintaining fully local, air-gapped inference. This system addresses a gap in Traditional Chinese special-education NLP and offers a scalable, privacy-preserving local inference solution under an industrial engineering paradigm.

</details>


### [369] [AGENTSERVESIM: A Hardware-aware Simulator for Multi-Turn LLM Agent Serving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09613)
*Rakibul Hasan Rajib,Mengxin Zheng,Qian Lou*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出AGENTSERVESIM，一个针对多轮LLM Agent服务的硬件感知仿真器，能在CPU上以6%误差内复现真实系统行为，支持程序粒度的服务策略评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM服务仿真器面向无状态请求处理，无法捕捉多轮Agent服务的核心动态（如跨轮缓存局部性、工具调用间隙的KV缓存驻留等），而直接在真实系统上评估策略成本高昂。

Method: 提出AGENTSERVESIM，包含四个可组合模块：程序编排器（维护程序身份和轮次顺序）、工具模拟器（模拟工具调用间隙）、会话感知路由器（维护程序到实例的亲和性实现缓存感知调度）、KV驻留模型（跟踪策略定义的KV放置）。

Result: 在真实服务部署和硬件配置上，AGENTSERVESIM在关键性能指标上以6%以内的误差复现真实系统行为，且完全运行在商用CPU上。

Conclusion: AGENTSERVESIM实现了对Agent服务策略的可控、可重复探索，无需在昂贵加速器上进行 exhaustive 部署。

Abstract: Multi-turn LLM agents interleave model calls with external tool invocations, shifting serving from stateless request processing to stateful program execution. Serving these workloads requires scheduling, KV-cache management, and routing policies that use program-level context, including turn dependencies, tool-induced gaps, and reusable KV state. Evaluating such policies directly on real systems is costly, since each design point may require dedicated accelerator time across arrival rates, model scales, serving-instance counts, and memory hierarchies. Simulation offers a scalable alternative, but existing LLM serving simulators target stateless request-level workloads and therefore omit the core dynamics of agent serving: multi-turn program execution, cross-turn cache locality, and KV-cache residency during tool gaps. We present AGENTSERVESIM, a hardware-aware simulator for multi-turn LLM agent serving. AGENTSERVESIM evaluates serving policies at program granularity through composable modules: a Program Orchestrator preserves program identity and turn order, a Tool Simulator materializes tool-induced gaps, a Session-Aware Router maintains program-to-instance affinity for cache-aware dispatch, and a KV Residency Model tracks policy-defined KV placement across HBM, host DRAM/CXL, and eviction. Across real serving deployments and hardware configurations, AGENTSERVESIM reproduces real-system behavior within 6% error across key performance metrics while running entirely on commodity CPUs. These results show that AGENTSERVESIM enables controlled, repeatable exploration of agent-serving policies without requiring exhaustive deployment on costly accelerators.

</details>


### [370] [Civil Court Simulation with Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09632)
*Yifan Chen,Haitao Li,Kaiyuan Zhang,Yueyue Wu,Qingyao Ai,Yiqun Liu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出一个面向中国民事案件的多智能体法庭模拟框架，通过五阶段庭审流程、记忆模块和法条检索，生成可靠的民事判决，并在责任分配和多项裁决上表现突出。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有法庭模拟依赖人工，成本高且难以规模化；而基于大语言模型的模拟主要集中在刑事案件，民事案件因其诉求、责任和救济更灵活而更具挑战性，亟需一个可扩展的民事法庭模拟方案。

Method: 设计了一个多智能体框架，包含按角色分工的智能体（如法官、原告、被告等），通过五阶段民事审判程序组织交互，并集成记忆模块和 statute retrieval（法条检索）以支持长流程的司法裁决过程。

Result: 实验表明该框架能生成可靠的民事判决，尤其在责任分配和多项裁决方面表现出明显优势；记忆质量对下游模拟质量有显著影响；通过五层因子框架分析了法律基础、信息条件、司法能力与角色定位、组织压力和社会背景对框架可靠性和行为的影响。

Conclusion: 该多智能体框架有效支持民事法庭模拟，为法律教育与司法实践提供可扩展方案，并揭示了影响模拟质量的关键因素。

Abstract: Court simulation bridges legal education and judicial practice, yet human-based simulations are costly and difficult to scale. Large language models (LLMs) offer a scalable alternative, but existing court-simulation research mainly focuses on criminal cases. Civil litigation is more common in practice and harder to simulate because its claims, liability, and remedies are more flexible. We present a multi-agent court simulation framework for Chinese civil cases. The framework organizes role-based interaction through a five-stage civil trial procedure and integrates memory module and statute retrieval to support long-process adjudication. Experiments show that the framework produces reliable civil judgments, with clear strengths in liability allocation and multi-item adjudication. Further experiments show that memory quality substantially affects downstream simulation quality. Through a five-layer factor framework, we analyze how legal grounding, information conditions, judicial capability and role orientation, organizational pressure, and social context affect the framework's reliability and behavior. These results support the effectiveness of the proposed framework for civil court simulation. The dataset and code are available at: https://github.com/foggpoy/Civil-Court.

</details>


### [371] [Gradient-Guided Reward Optimization for Inference-time Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09635)
*Hankun Lin,Ruqi Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出GGRO，一种轻量级推理时对齐方法，通过梯度引导在解码阶段进行最小干预，利用token级熵检测高不确定性区域，并注入梯度信号生成的引导token来修正生成轨迹，在安全、有用性和推理基准上持续改进对齐效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有推理时对齐方法（如Best-of-N、拒绝采样）存在两个局限：性能受限于基座模型的生成质量，且依赖不完美的奖励模型容易导致奖励黑客攻击。需要一种更轻量、更鲁棒的推理时对齐方法。

Method: GGRO在解码过程中监控token级熵，识别表示漂移或错位的高不确定性区域；检测到后，利用现成奖励模型的梯度信号生成引导token，注入解码过程以修正生成轨迹，而非简单地对样本重排序。

Result: 在安全、有用性和推理基准上持续改进对齐效果；提高了高质量响应的覆盖率和对抗奖励黑客的鲁棒性；计算开销极低。

Conclusion: GGRO作为一种轻量级推理时对齐方法，通过梯度引导的精准干预有效解决了现有方法依赖采样和易受奖励黑客攻击的问题，为LLM在分布漂移下的可靠性提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Ensuring the reliability of Large Language Models (LLMs) under distribution drift requires inference-time adaptation. While inference-time alignment methods such as Best-of-$N$ and rejection sampling are widely used, they frame the task as a sampling-intensive, reward-guided search, leading to two key limitations: their performance is bounded by the base model's generation quality, and their reliance on imperfect reward models makes them vulnerable to reward hacking. To address these challenges, we introduce Gradient-Guided Reward Optimization (GGRO), a lightweight inference-time method that performs targeted, minimal intervention during decoding via gradient guidance. Specifically, GGRO monitors token-level entropy to identify high-uncertainty regions indicative of drift or misalignment. Upon detection, it responds by injecting nudging tokens, generated using gradient signals from an off-the-shelf reward model, to steer the generation trajectory rather than merely re-ranking samples. Experiments show that GGRO consistently improves inference-time alignment across safety, helpfulness, and reasoning benchmarks. It also increases coverage of high-quality responses and robustness to reward hacking, with minimal computational overhead. Code is available at https://github.com/lhk2004/GGRO.

</details>


### [372] [Where Does the Answer Come From? Benchmarking View-Level Visual Evidence Identification in Multi-View MLLMs for Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09644)
*Yimu Wang,Yee Man Choi,Barry Zhang,Mozhgan Nasr Azadani,Sean Sedwards,Krzysztof Czarnecki*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出了一个多视图视觉问答基准，用于评估多模态大模型在自动驾驶场景中是否正确识别支持性相机视角，而非仅看答案正确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MLLM评估仅关注答案正确性，无法判断模型是否依赖了正确的视觉证据，尤其在多视图自动驾驶场景中模型可能用错误视角得出看似合理的答案。

Method: 基于NuScenes构建122个冲突导向的问答对，覆盖因果、反事实推理和意图预测；通过自动冲突挖掘流水线提出视角标签并由人工验证；设计了视角选择、oracle QA和联合预测三种评估设置。

Result: 通过显式分离视觉源识别与答案正确性，揭示了仅评估答案所遗漏的grounding失败。

Conclusion: 该基准能有效暴露MLLM在多视图场景下的视角定位缺陷，弥补了传统答案正确性评估的不足。

Abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) achieve strong results on visual reasoning benchmarks, but answer accuracy alone does not indicate whether a model relied on the correct visual evidence. This gap is particularly important in multi-view driving scenes used for autonomous driving, where a model can produce a plausible answer while grounding it in the wrong camera view. We introduce a multi-view visual question answering benchmark for evaluating evidence-source identification: given six synchronized NuScenes views and a question, the model must identify the supporting camera view and answer the question. The benchmark contains 122 conflict-centric question-answer pairs from 73 scenes, spanning causality, counterfactual reasoning, and intent prediction. View labels are proposed by an automatic conflict-mining pipeline and manually verified by annotators. We evaluate three settings: camera-view selection, oracle QA given the golden view, and joint prediction in which the model selects a view and answers in one pass. Answers are evaluated in both multiple-choice and free-form formats, using exact match for structured predictions and an LLM judge for free-form responses. By explicitly separating visual-source identification from answer correctness, the benchmark exposes grounding failures that answer-only evaluation misses.

</details>


### [373] [Beyond Accuracy: Community Perspectives on Machine Translation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09655)
*Yujun Wang,Ehud Reiter,Shimei Pan,Steffen Eger,Wei Zhao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文通过对2019-2025年间来自Reddit、Facebook、Bluesky和Mastodon的79,286条帖子和评论进行大规模分析，首次系统研究了AI开发者、专业译者、语言学习者和语言服务提供商这四个利益相关群体在社交媒体上对机器翻译技术的讨论，发现不同群体之间存在显著分歧甚至冲突，根本原因在于AI社区将其视为技术/计算问题，而用户社区更关注质量细节、时间节省、用户信任和更广泛的社会问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管机器翻译技术取得了显著进展，但非AI社区对其日益增长的担忧表明技术进步与真实用户需求之间存在明显差距（例如NLP研究者关注基准性能，而终端用户关心伦理、信任、可靠性、成本等问题）。作者认为倾听不同用户社区的声音至关重要，以便研究工作能够朝着社区真正关心的问题方向努力。

Method: 收集2019-2025年间Reddit、Facebook、Bluesky和Mastodon上的79,286条帖子和评论，构建数据集；对AI开发者、专业译者、语言学习者和语言服务提供商四个利益相关群体进行大规模社交媒体内容分析，研究这些社区之间的分歧点、分歧方式及原因。

Result: 研究发现各社区之间经常存在分歧，甚至在翻译质量、效率和可靠性等话题上由于情绪极化而表现出强烈冲突。AI社区将这些问题框架为技术和计算问题，而非AI（用户）社区更关注质量细节、时间节省、用户信任和更广泛的社会问题。

Conclusion: 不同利益相关群体对机器翻译技术的关注点和价值观存在根本性差异，研究界应当认真倾听用户社区的声音，将研究努力导向真正重要的问题上，以弥合技术进步与真实需求之间的鸿沟。

Abstract: Despite remarkable progress in machine translation (MT), non-AI communities have raised growing concerns about MT systems, suggesting a noticeable gap between technical advancement and the needs of real-world users. For instance, while NLP researchers focus on benchmark performance, end users care about ethical concerns, trust, reliability, costs, and more. We argue that listening to various user communities is essential so that research efforts would be directed towards the problems that the communities care about. To this end, we present a large-scale analysis, for the first time, that investigates what four stakeholder communities (AI developers, professional translators, language learners, and language service providers) post about MT technology on social media. To do so, we construct a dataset of 79,286 posts and comments from Reddit, Facebook, Bluesky, and Mastodon from 2019 to 2025, and analyse where these communities disagree, and how and why. Overall, we find that communities often disagree, and even show strong conflicts due to polarised sentiments on topics such as translation quality, efficiency, and reliability. This is because these communities approach these topics differently: the AI community frames them as technical and computational problems, while non-AI (user) communities care more about quality nuances, time savings, user trust, and broader social issues.

</details>


### [374] [End-to-End Context Compression at Scale](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09659)
*Ang Li,Sean McLeish,Haozhe Chen,Nimit Kalra,Zaiqian Chen,Artem Gazizov,Venkata Anoop Suhas Kumar Morisetty,Bhavya Kailkhura,Harshitha Menon,Zhuang Liu,Brian R. Bartoldson,Tom Goldstein,Sanae Lotfi,Micah Goldblum,Pavel Izmailov*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出Latent Context Language Models (LCLMs)，一种编码器-解码器压缩器家族，通过架构搜索和大量预训练（350B tokens），在压缩比1:4、1:8、1:16下显著改进了长上下文LLM推理的精度-效率前沿，并可作为长时程智能体的高效骨干网络。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长上下文语言模型推理受限于内存（KV缓存随上下文长度增长），现有KV缓存压缩方法要么严重降低模型质量，要么需要大量时间和计算资源，且与现代推理引擎不兼容。作者旨在重新审视编码器-解码器压缩方法，弥补其在精度-效率前沿上的差距。

Method: 1) 进行架构搜索，从头预训练多种变体以确定最佳设计；2) 基于搜索发现，持续预训练一系列0.6B编码器+4B解码器的模型，每个模型在超过350B tokens上训练；3) 支持1:4、1:8、1:16三种压缩比；4) 使模型能作为长时程智能体，支持压缩上下文的快速浏览和按需扩展。

Result: LCLMs在通用任务性能、压缩速度和峰值内存使用三个维度上改进了Pareto前沿，在精度-效率权衡上优于现有KV缓存压缩方法，且与现代推理引擎兼容。

Conclusion: 编码器-解码器压缩方法经过精心设计后可以缩小与KV缓存压缩的差距，甚至超越后者。LCLMs为长上下文推理和长时程智能体应用提供了高效、实用的解决方案。

Abstract: Long-context language model inference is bottlenecked by memory, as the KV cache grows with context length. Recent techniques to compress the KV cache fall short: they either degrade model quality substantially or require considerable time and compute to compress a single long prompt. Furthermore, many methods require the input to fit within the target model's context window, and are generally incompatible with modern production inference engines. Encoder-decoder compressors, which map a long token sequence to a shorter sequence of latent embeddings consumed by a decoder, are an appealing alternative in principle. However, existing approaches are not competitive with KV cache compression on the accuracy-efficiency frontier. In this work, we revisit encoder-decoder compression and close this gap. We first perform an architecture search, pre-training many variants from scratch to determine how best to design and train encoder-decoder compressors. Guided by our findings, we continually pre-train a family of 0.6B-encoder, 4B-decoder models on over 350B tokens each, at compression ratios of 1:4, 1:8, and 1:16. We introduce Latent Context Language Models (LCLMs), a family of compressors that improve the Pareto frontier across general-task performance, compression speed, and peak memory usage. We demonstrate that LCLMs serve as efficient backbones for long-horizon agents, letting the agent skim through a compressed long context and adaptively expand relevant segments on demand.

</details>


### [375] [When Built-in Thinking Helps and Hurts: Constraint-Level Error Shifts in Instruction Following](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09662)
*Sai Adith Senthil Kumar*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了思维链推理对指令遵循能力的影响，发现思维模式并非整体提升或降低性能，而是改变了错误分布：全局性规划类约束改善，精确局部形式约束恶化。通过激活修补等分析揭示了两种约束类型在推理痕迹与最终输出之间的执行差距差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型推理模型（LRM）在数学和代码任务上表现优异，但思维链推理对指令遵循能力的影响尚不明确。作者希望探究"思考"是否会改变模型遵循指令的模式，而非简单地提升或降低性能。

Method: 使用Qwen3系列模型（1.7B-32B）的Thinking ON/OFF控制实验，辅以Hunyuan模型作为跨家族验证；基于IFEval评估标准，将约束类型分为Planning（全局规划类）和Precision（精确局部形式）；采用交叉编码器相关性指标分析思维痕迹，并利用激活修补技术在大规模模型上进行因果分析。

Result: 聚合通过率变化很小（-0.55到-3.52个百分点），但10-20%的提示在两种模式间切换通过/失败；Planning类约束在思维模式下改善，Precision类约束持续恶化；四种Hunyuan模型的方向性一致；思维痕迹分析显示三类模式（Neutral正相关、Planning近零相关、Precision负相关）；激活修补显示Precision翻转实例比Planning翻转实例更容易被恢复（32-58% vs. 14-40%）。

Conclusion: 思维链推理对指令遵循的影响是双面的：它能帮助模型更好地处理需要全局规划的约束，但会损害需要精确局部形式匹配的约束。这种差异源于推理痕迹与最终输出之间的"执行差距"，为理解思维链推理的机制性影响提供了新视角。

Abstract: Large reasoning models (LRMs) often improve math and coding performance, but their effect on instruction following is unclear. We study IFEval with Qwen3 models (1.7B-32B), using same-weights Thinking ON/OFF controls; four Hunyuan models provide directional cross-family support. Aggregate pass-rate changes are small (-0.55 to -3.52 pp), yet 10-20% of prompts switch between pass and fail across modes, suggesting that thinking changes the pattern of errors--some prompts improve while others worsen--rather than uniformly degrading performance. Under a post-hoc Qwen3-derived grouping, constraint types separate into Planning (global counting, structure, coordination), which improves at the class level under thinking, and Precision (exact local form), which consistently worsens; the class-level Planning/Precision sign pattern holds directionally for all four Hunyuan models despite Hunyuan's opposite aggregate direction. Thinking also changes final-answer length; matched-length analyses substantially reduce the Precision drop, but a residual penalty remains. Analyzing thinking traces with a cross-encoder relevance metric reveals three patterns: Neutral shows a positive relevance-compliance link (r approximately 0.15); Planning shows near-zero predictive correlation (r approximately 0.02) despite measurable trace engagement, consistent with an execution gap between CE-measured trace relevance and final-answer compliance; Precision shows a small negative correlation (r approximately -0.05), with failing instances having higher mean relevance than passing ones. Activation patching across four model sizes (1.7B-14B) shows that Precision flip instances are more often restored than Planning flip instances (32-58% vs. 14-40% mean layer-restoration), with the largest gap at 14B (about 30 pp).

</details>


### [376] [PsychoSafe: Eliciting Psychologically-Informed Refusals in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09697)
*Gianluca Barmina,Federico Torrielli,Sven Harms,Jacob Nielsen,Felix Mächtle,Stine Lyngsø Beltoft,Peter Schneider-Kamp,Thomas Eisenbarth,Lukas Galke Poech,Anne Lauscher*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出PsychoSafe框架，将LLM的拒绝行为重构为基于心理学证据的结构化支持性沟通，通过构建8019个提示-响应对并在Qwen 3.5 27B上微调，在拒绝质量上相比基线提升28.1%，尤其在外源资源推荐（+46.8%）和心理锚定（+34.8%）方面表现突出。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM在处理高风险交互（如危机、胁迫、意图升级）时，简单拒绝虽然能防止直接伤害，但无法支持请求者背后的真实需求。作者希望将拒绝重构为一种结构化的、支持性的沟通方式，兼顾安全防护与人文关怀。

Method: 构建涵盖5个心理风险领域的8019个提示-响应对，通过提示工程和参数高效微调（PEFT）对Qwen 3.5 27B进行训练，使用LLM裁判和人工评分在500个提示的平衡验证集上评估。

Result: PsychoSafe提示在拒绝质量上比基线提升28.1%，外源资源推荐提升46.8%，心理锚定提升34.8%。微调达到近乎完美的拒绝和资源推荐率，但降低了响应相关性。在SORRY-Bench和XSTest上表现出较强的域内鲁棒性但域外泛化有限。

Conclusion: PsychoSafe在提升高风险交互中LLM的拒绝质量方面效果显著，但域外泛化能力不足，未来应丰富微调数据的多样性，帮助模型选择性而非刻板地应用干预策略。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) routinely face requests that should be refused, creating a trade-off between helpfulness and harm prevention. However, refusals themselves can be helpful. In high-risk interactions involving crisis, coercion, or escalating intent, blunt non-compliance may prevent direct harm while still failing to support the needs of the person behind the request. We present PsychoSafe, a psychologically-informed refusal framework that reframes refusal as structured supportive communication grounded in evidence-based intervention strategies. To develop PsychoSafe, we construct a corpus of 8019 prompt-response pairs spanning five psychologically salient risk domains and apply prompting and parameter-efficient fine-tuning to Qwen 3.5 27B. On a balanced validation set of 500 prompts, evaluated with an LLM judge and validated through human ratings, PsychoSafe prompting improves overall refusal quality by 28.1% over a generic baseline, with particularly strong gains in external resource referral (+46.8%) and psychological grounding (+34.8%), while preserving downstream performance on non-refusal tasks. Fine-tuning achieves near-perfect refusal and resource-referral rates but reduces response relevance. Additional evaluations on SORRY-Bench and XSTest show strong in-domain robustness but limited out-of-domain generalization, suggesting that future work should diversify fine-tuning data to help models apply interventions selectively rather than schematically.

</details>


### [377] [Learning to Attack and Defend: Adaptive Red Teaming of Language Models via GRPO](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09701)
*Blake Bullwinkel,Eugenia Kim,Amanda Minnich,Mark Russinovich*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出AdvGRPO框架，通过密集多通道奖励和解耦优势归一化，使GRPO在红蓝对抗训练中稳定有效，生成可迁移攻击并提升防御者安全性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有PPO和DPO在红蓝对抗中有效，但GRPO训练不稳定；需要一种方法让GRPO也能用于联合攻防优化。

Method: AdvGRPO框架：1）密集多通道奖励 + 解耦优势归一化；2）课程学习：从单轮→多轮闭环比对攻击→交替更新攻防模型。

Result: 生成高效且可迁移的攻击；联合训练的防御者在安全基准上优于基线方法。

Conclusion: AdvGRPO成功使GRPO适用于红蓝对抗训练，提升了攻防双方的效果。

Abstract: AI red teaming must continually adapt to evolving attackers and defenders. Reinforcement learning offers a promising approach to discovering novel attacks, and co-training methods can produce more robust defenders in tandem. Recent works have demonstrated the efficacy of attacker-defender co-training by applying PPO and DPO, but report that GRPO is unstable in this setting. We introduce AdvGRPO, a co-training framework that makes GRPO viable for joint attacker-defender optimization using dense multi-channel rewards and decoupled advantage normalization. Training progresses through a curriculum from single-turn to closed-loop multi-turn attacks before bootstrapping co-training, where attacker and defender models are updated in alternation. We show that our method can produce highly effective and transferable attacks and that co-trained defenders outperform baselines on safety benchmarks.

</details>


### [378] [IS-CoT: Breaking the Long-form Generation Collapse via Interleaved Structural Thinking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09709)
*Zechen Sun,Yuyang Sun,Zecheng Tang,Juntao Li,Wenpeng Hu,Wenliang Chen,Zhunchen Luo,Guotong Geng,Min Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出IS-CoT框架，通过嵌入动态Plan-Write-Reflect循环解决LLM在长文本生成中的长度崩溃问题，IS-Writer-8B在长文本基准上超越DeepSeek-V3.2等大模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有推理增强型LLM在开放写作中存在严重的长度崩溃问题，当目标长度超过2000词时性能急剧下降，原因是静态分层规划无法在长上下文中提供动态指导。

Method: 提出IS-CoT框架，将动态Plan-Write-Reflect循环嵌入生成过程，通过多教师pipeline构建交错推理轨迹数据集，训练IS-Writer-8B模型。

Result: IS-Writer-8B在LongBench-Write上比DeepSeek-V3.2高出3.08分，展现了出色的长度遵从性和连贯性，可与更大规模专有模型竞争。

Conclusion: 交错式结构化思维链框架有效解决了长文本生成的长度崩溃问题，无需外部辅助即可实现持续策略调整和全局对齐。

Abstract: Generating coherent and controllable long-form content remains a persistent challenge for Large Language Models (LLMs). While reasoning-enhanced models have demonstrated success in logic-intensive domains, our evaluation reveals that they suffer from a severe length collapse in open-ended writing, where performance degrades sharply as target lengths exceed 2,000 words. We attribute this failure to the limitation of static hierarchical planning, which struggles to provide dynamic guidance over extended contexts. To bridge this gap, we introduce the Interleaved Structural Chain-of-Thought (IS-CoT) framework. Unlike external agentic workflows, IS-CoT embeds a dynamic Plan-Write-Reflect cycle into the generation process, enabling continuous strategy adaptation and global alignment without additional assistance. Based on this framework, we construct a high-quality dataset of interleaved reasoning traces via a multi-teacher pipeline and train IS-Writer-8B. Experiments demonstrate that IS-Writer-8B achieves state-of-the-art performance on challenging long-form benchmarks (e.g., +3.08 vs. DeepSeek-V3.2 on LongBench-Write), exhibiting robust length compliance and coherence competitive with significantly larger proprietary models.

</details>


### [379] [The Neutral Mask: How RLHF Provides Shallow Alignment while Leaving Partisan Structure Intact in a Large Language Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09735)
*Wendy K. Tam*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文通过机制分析发现，RLHF并未消除Llama 3.1 8B中的党派政治偏向，而是切断了从内部党派几何结构到输出生成的因果路径，实现了功能性的政治中立，但这种对齐是脆弱的，可以被用户身份推断等操作绕过。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有证据表明RLHF可能只产生功能合规而非深度对齐，但其具体机制尚不透明。作者想探究：RLHF究竟编码了什么价值、编码了谁的价值、以及如何编码这些价值。

Method: 以Llama 3.1 8B为对象，比较基座模型与Instruct模型（RLHF后）的内部表征；使用稀疏自编码器分解特征；进行特征级引导实验。

Result: 1) RLHF没有移除基座模型中的党派方向结构，而是压缩了党派信号的方差。2) 基座模型中零星激活的编码特征在Instruct模型中完全失活。3) 特征引导实验证实了因果断开。4) 绕过护栏的机制（如推断用户党派身份）可以重新激活党派生成。

Conclusion: RLHF实现的是功能性中立而非结构性中立：它没有擦除党派知识，而是切断了从内部表征到输出的因果路径。这种对齐是脆弱的，可能同样发生在其他价值领域。

Abstract: The ambition behind alignment training is to make large language models safe and useful. The primary mechanism, reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF), shapes the behavior of deployed language models by aligning them with ``human values.'' Yet the process is opaque. What values are being encoded; whose values are they; and how does RLHF encode them? A growing body of evidence suggests that RLHF produces only functional compliance rather than deep alignment. We offer a mechanistic case study of this phenomenon for partisan political orientation with a comparison of the internal representations of Llama 3.1 8B before and after RLHF. We show that RLHF does not remove the structured partisan direction in the base model. Instead, it compresses the variance of the partisan signal to generate consistently balanced and non-partisan output. Sparse autoencoder decomposition reveals that policy-encoding features, which activate sporadically in the base model, are completely inactive in the Instruct model. Feature-level steering experiments confirm the causal disconnect. RLHF thus encodes a norm of political neutrality, not by erasing the model's knowledge of partisanship, but by severing the causal pathway from partisan geometry to output generation. Importantly, this neutrality is functional, not structural so that the underlying geometry that enables partisan steering remains intact. The mechanisms that bypass RLHF's guardrails, such as inferring and amplifying a user's partisan identity, reactivate partisan generation. If RLHF operates by disconnecting rather than removing value-laden structure, then the same pattern may hold for other value domains, and the aligned model's behavior may be more fragile than its outputs suggest.

</details>


### [380] [Data Synthesis and Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning for Low-Resource NMT: A Case Study on Q'eqchi' Mayan](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09767)
*Alexander Chulzhanov,Soeren Eberhardt,Arjun Mukherjee*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种数据合成方法，利用社区词典为低资源土著语言（Q'eqchi' Mayan）生成大规模合成语料，结合PEFT（LoRA）微调mT5-base模型来引导NMT。在域内评估中取得高BLEU（42.02），但面对自然语料时语义表现极差（BLEU 0.59），表明合成数据能有效教学结构（形态与语序），但缺乏真实的词汇语义基础。多任务学习导致负迁移，最终认为合成启动作为结构预训练有效，但需要真实数据进行课程学习的语义精炼。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 数字低资源土著语言的神经机器翻译面临极严重的数据稀缺问题，传统方法依赖网络爬取，但可能侵犯数据主权。因此，研究旨在不爬取目标语言平行文本的前提下，通过数据合成方式引导NMT模型，服务于Q'eqchi' Mayan这类语言。

Method: 利用社区词典构建大规模合成语料；采用参数高效微调（PEFT）中的LoRA适配器对mT5-base模型进行微调；并设计多任务学习（MTL）消融实验，探讨辅助任务的影响。

Result: 在域内评估中BLEU达42.02，模型成功习得复杂黏着形态和VOS语序；但在有机词汇标准下BLEU仅0.59，模型保持了语法完整性但缺乏自然语言的词汇语义。MTL导致负迁移，辅助任务竞争有限参数容量，导致过优化合成标记而损失有机灵活性。

Conclusion: 合成数据引导作为结构启动非常有效，但需要结合真实数据进行课程学习以实现语义精炼。

Abstract: Neural machine translation for digitally low-resource Indigenous languages is often hindered by extreme data scarcity, prompting reliance on extractive web-scraping. To ensure data sovereignty, this study introduces a data synthesis methodology to bootstrap NMT models without scraping target-language parallel text. Focusing on Q'eqchi' Mayan, we transformed community-sourced dictionaries into a massive synthetic corpus, utilizing Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) via LoRA adapters on an mT5-base model.
  In-domain evaluation demonstrates high structural acquisition (BLEU 42.02), proving that synthetic constraints effectively teach complex agglutinative morphology and VOS word order. However, evaluation against an organic glossary reveals a structural-semantic gap (BLEU 0.59), where the model maintains grammatical integrity but lacks the lexical grounding of natural language. The model exhibits overfitting to the constrained structural variance of the synthetic templates; despite high semantic entropy in the pipeline, it struggles with the syntactic fluidity of natural language, forcing organic inputs into rigid learned patterns. Furthermore, an ablation study utilizing a Multi-Task Learning architecture resulted in negative transfer, suggesting that auxiliary tasks competed for limited parameter capacity within the LoRA adapters, causing over-optimization for synthetic markers at the expense of organic flexibility. Ultimately, we establish that synthetic bootstrapping is a highly effective structural primer, but requires authentic data for semantic refinement via Curriculum Learning.

</details>


### [381] [Causally Evaluating the Learnability of Formal Language Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09822)
*Vésteinn Snæbjarnarson,Anej Svete,Josef Valvoda,Reda Boumasmoud,Brian DuSell,Ryan Cotterell*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文通过形式语言（概率有限自动机）作为受控实验平台，引入因果分析方法（binning半环）来研究数据频率与任务可学习性之间的关系，并证明标准的相关性评估方法会因混杂变量而导致错误结论。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究语言模型中任务特定数据量与可学习性的因果关系，揭示自然语言任务中相关性评估的缺陷。

Method: 使用形式语言（概率有限自动机）作为受控测试平台；引入binning半环代数结构以控制目标属性在语料中的出现频率；构建因果图模型；推导分解的KL散度指标来度量子任务的可学习性。

Result: 不进行因果干预的相关性分析会因混杂变量导致错误的可学习性结论；因果分析方法能更准确地揭示数据频率与学习效果的真实关系。

Conclusion: 因果干预是评估数据频率与可学习性关系的必要手段，研究结果对自然语言场景中的相关性陷阱提出警示。

Abstract: Language models, as multi-task learners, acquire a wide range of abilities during training. A fundamental question is how much task-specific data is needed to learn a given task. Answering this for natural language is difficult: tasks are hard to delineate and can confound one another. To rigorously investigate the relationship between data frequency and learnability, we turn to a controlled setting using formal languages induced from probabilistic finite automata. These serve as a methodological testbed to demonstrate that standard correlational evaluation practices are inherently flawed. To enable causal analysis, we introduce the binning semiring, an algebraic object that lets us control how often a targeted property occurs in a sampled corpus. We formulate the experimental pipeline as a causal graphical model and derive decomposed Kullback-Leibler divergence metrics to measure the learnability of specific sub-tasks. Our experiments show that evaluating learnability without causal intervention leads to incorrect conclusions due to confounders in correlational analysis, and serve as a warning about correlational pitfalls in natural-language settings.

</details>


<div id='cs.NI'></div>

# cs.NI [[Back]](#toc)

### [382] [Selecting New Measurement Locations to Diversify Traffic-Pattern Coverage: A Real-World Evaluation for Total Traffic Volume Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07556)
*Masaaki Inoue,Akifumi Okuno,Shintaro Fukushima*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出一种算法，利用广泛可用的位置数据（如智能手机）来决定新增交通计数器的安装位置，通过增加观测到的交通信号模式多样性，而非均匀分布，来提升城市级交通流量估计的准确性，并在实际城市中验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 固定交通计数器安装和维护成本高，只能覆盖少量地点，导致难以全面掌握城市级交通流量。而智能手机等设备虽覆盖广但数据有偏且噪声大，不足以直接估计总流量。因此需要结合两者优势，用广泛设备数据指导计数器选址，以低成本提升估计性能。

Method: 提出一种算法，选择新增计数器位置以增加观测到的交通信号模式多样性（而非空间均匀分布），目标是捕获当前计数器集中稀缺的交通模式，使观测数据更具代表性，从而改进后续的估计和预测。

Result: 在目标城市中，根据算法选定新位置并自费部署实地测量。结果表明，新增数据在不同保真度下均提升了交通流量估计的准确性。

Conclusion: 通过利用广泛设备数据指导交通计数器选址，尤其是注重捕捉多样化的交通模式而非均匀布点，能够有效提升城市级交通流量估计性能，为低成本智能交通监测提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Accurate measurement of traffic volumes and flows is vital for modern intelligent transportation. However, despite recent technological advances in sensor devices, it is still expensive to install and maintain fixed traffic counters. Therefore, it is restricted to a small portion of location points where the counters can be installed, which severely limits the possibility of grasping and predicting the total traffic volume at a city-wide level. By contrast, devices with location history such as smartphones and connected vehicles are now widely used and provide much wider spatial coverage. However, the data from these devices are usually partial and noisy, so they are not enough to directly estimate total traffic volumes and flows. In this paper, we use the information from these widely available devices to help decide where to place additional traffic counters, and we study how selecting new measurement locations can improve city-wide traffic estimation performance. To achieve this, we propose an algorithm that chooses additional counter locations to increase the diversity of observed traffic signal patterns, rather than simply spreading counters evenly over space. The goal is to capture traffic-pattern types that are rare in the current counter set and to make the collected observations more representative for later estimation and forecasting. We also present a real-world evaluation; in a target city, we select new locations expected to improve traffic prediction, and we then commissioned new field measurements at those locations at our expense. The resulting data led to an improvement in traffic volume estimation accuracy across different fidelities.

</details>


### [383] [Spectrum Aggregation for 6G: Lessons from 5G Carrier Aggregation and Dual Connectivity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07944)
*Xingqin Lin*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文探讨了5G载波聚合(CA)和双连接(DC)如何为6G频谱聚合设计提供参考，主张增强型CA应作为6G多频段运营的首选聚合框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 频谱聚合是LTE和5G容量增长的关键，在6G扩展到更多频段时将变得更加重要，因此需要研究如何设计6G的频谱聚合方案。

Method: 通过分析5G中CA和DC的实践经验，比较两者的优缺点，提出6G频谱聚合的设计方向。

Result: DC加速了5G非独立组网部署但带来了架构碎片化和长期迁移复杂性，而CA提供了更简洁、可扩展的基础，因此增强型CA更适合6G独立组网。

Conclusion: 主张增强型CA作为6G首选的聚合框架，并指出了关键的增强方向。

Abstract: Spectrum aggregation has been a key enabler of LTE and 5G capacity growth, but it will become even more fundamental in 6G as networks expand across low bands, existing mid bands, new upper-mid/centimetric bands, and millimeter wave bands. This article examines how 5G carrier aggregation (CA) and dual connectivity (DC) inform the design of 6G spectrum aggregation. We argue that, while DC was instrumental in accelerating early non-standalone 5G deployment, it also introduced architectural fragmentation and long-term migration complexity. In contrast, CA provides a cleaner and more scalable foundation for multi-band operation in standalone 6G. Building on lessons from 5G, we advocate enhanced CA as the preferred 6G aggregation framework and point out the corresponding key enhancement directions.

</details>


### [384] [Blockage-Aware Non-stationary Dynamic Bandit for User Association in mmWave V2X Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08118)
*Weiqi Chi,Manabu Tsukada*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 提出BAND框架，将毫米波车载网络中的用户关联问题建模为非平稳上下文bandit问题，通过CUSUM变化检测和主动阻塞检测实现分布式、无CSI的移动性管理，显著降低遗憾值并提升网络通信速率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 毫米波车载网络中，密集基站部署导致用户关联决策空间膨胀，动态阻塞引起链路质量波动，传统MAB框架假设奖励分布平稳，无法应对车辆移动和短暂阻塞造成的上下文-奖励映射快速变化，亟需一种能处理非平稳环境的分布式移动性管理方案。

Method: 将用户关联建模为非平稳上下文bandit问题；采用CUSUM变化检测动态缩小活跃基站集以减少探索开销；引入主动阻塞检测机制抑制瞬态信号衰减对奖励估计的干扰；完全分布式、无需中心协调或离线训练、无需CSI信息。

Result: 与基于超立方体的上下文bandit基线相比，遗憾值降低超过40%，网络通信速率提升达33.1%；在不同阻塞率和网络配置下均验证了鲁棒性。

Conclusion: BAND框架有效解决了毫米波车载网络中的非平稳用户关联问题，通过检测环境和阻塞变化实现自适应优化，在性能和鲁棒性上均优于现有方法。

Abstract: In millimeter-wave (mmWave) vehicular networks, dense base station (BS) deployments expand the user association (UA) decision space while dynamic blockages cause link quality fluctuations, posing critical challenges for effective mobility management. Traditional Multi-Armed Bandit (MAB) frameworks assume stationary reward distributions and fail to handle the rapid context-reward mapping shifts caused by vehicle mobility and transient blockages. To address this, we propose Blockage-Aware Non-stationary Dynamic Bandit (BAND), a fully distributed, channel state information (CSI)-free mobility management framework for mmWave vehicular networks, formulating UA as a non-stationary contextual bandit problem, enabling online adaptive optimization without requiring central coordination or offline training. BAND employs a cumulative sum-based change detection (CUSUM-CD) to dynamically narrow the active BS set, reducing exploration overhead while tracking reward distribution shifts. Proactive blockage detection suppresses transient signal degradation in the reward estimation process. Simulations demonstrate over 40% regret reduction and up to 33.1% network communication rate improvement compared with hypercube-based contextual bandit baselines, with robustness validated across varying blockage rates and network configurations.

</details>


### [385] [Systems-Level Planning and Coordination of Truck-Drone Collaborative Delivery Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08738)
*Didem Cicek,Burak Kantarci*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向城市最后一公里包裹配送的卡车-无人机协同配送（TDCD）分层规划与协调框架，包含空间需求对齐、协同配送配置、资源与工作流编排、性能评估和可扩展性分析五个相互关联的层级。基于2021年亚马逊最后一公里路径规划挑战数据集的实际案例研究表明，相比传统纯卡车配送模式，该框架实现了总配送时间降低42.4%、能耗降低44.2%的效果，且协同增益在系统规模扩大时仍然持续存在。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 城市最后一公里包裹配送日益依赖异构车队，其性能受到及时协调、可靠通信和可扩展控制的制约。卡车-无人机协作作为一种网络化信息物理配送范式，结合了卡车的载货能力和续航效率与无人机在拥堵或受限城市环境中的灵活性，但现有研究缺乏从系统与控制视角出发的统一协调框架。

Method: 提出五层分层规划与协调框架：(1) 空间需求对齐层；(2) 协同配送配置层；(3) 资源与工作流编排层；(4) 性能评估层；(5) 可扩展性分析层。该框架从系统与控制视角统一了协同配送中的协调、控制和系统级性能分析。

Result: 基于2021年亚马逊最后一公里路径规划研究挑战赛数据集的真实场景案例研究表明，相比纯卡车配送模式，卡车-无人机协同配送在结构化任务编排和智能体间同步下，总配送时间降低42.4%，能耗降低44.2%。可扩展性分析表明协同增益随系统规模扩大仍持续存在，同时揭示了高效控制与通信在异构配送网络中的重要性。

Conclusion: 卡车-无人机协同配送能够显著提升城市最后一公里配送效率，所提出的五层分层框架为异构车队协同配送提供了系统的分析与设计视角；高效的控制与通信机制是实现协同增益的关键。

Abstract: Urban last-mile parcel delivery increasingly relies on heterogeneous fleets whose performance depends on timely coordination, reliable communication, and scalable control. Truck-drone collaboration has emerged as a networked cyber-physical delivery paradigm that combines the payload capacity and range efficiency of trucks with the agility of drones in congested or access-limited urban environments. This paper proposes a layered planning and coordination framework that structures truck-drone collaborative delivery (TDCD) from a systems and control perspective. The framework consists of five interrelated layers: spatial-demand alignment, collaborative delivery configuration, resource and workflow orchestration, performance evaluation, and scalability analysis, providing a unified view of coordination, control, and system-level performance in networked delivery operations. The proposed framework is evaluated using a realistic urban last-mile delivery scenario derived from the 2021 Amazon Last Mile Routing Research Challenge dataset. The case study demonstrates how coordinated truck-drone operation, enabled by structured task orchestration and inter-agent synchronization, improves end-to-end system efficiency under operational constraints. Results show a 42.4% reduction in total delivery time and a 44.2% reduction in energy consumption compared to a conventional truck-only delivery model. The scalability analysis further highlights how coordination gains persist as system size increases, and shows the importance of efficient control and communication in heterogeneous delivery networks.

</details>


### [386] [Semantic and Task-Oriented V2X Communications: Pushing the Limits of V2X Networks Scalability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09126)
*Luca Lusvarghi,Javier Gozalvez,Mohammad Irfan Khan,Seyhan Ucar,Miguel Sepulcre,Onur Altintas*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文通过数值实验证明，语义和任务导向的V2X通信相比传统方法可将网络可支持车辆数提升4.1倍，消息接收间隔降低67%，相关信息成功交付概率翻倍，从而显著提升V2X网络的可扩展性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有V2X通信范式优先保证信息可靠及时传递，但忽视消息内容的选择性，导致传输不必要信息、通信资源利用率低下，难以支持大规模联网自动驾驶部署的可扩展性需求。

Method: 采用语义和任务导向的V2X通信方法，专注于传输消息内容的语义相关性，根据接收方的实际任务需求进行内容筛选与传递。

Result: 高密度条件下支持车辆数提升高达4.1倍；消息间接收间隔降低67%；所有相关信息成功交付概率提升至2倍。

Conclusion: 语义和任务导向的V2X通信能够有效解决现有通信范式的可扩展性瓶颈，通过内容感知的消息传输大幅提升网络效率，是支撑大规模联网自动驾驶的关键技术路径。

Abstract: Scalable Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) networks are key to support the large-scale deployment of connected and automated mobility. However, the scalability of V2X networks is currently challenged by the limitations of existing V2X communication paradigms, which prioritize the reliable and timely delivery of the transmitted information over a careful message content selection - an approach that can potentially lead to the transmission of unnecessary information and an inefficient usage of communication resources. Semantic and task-oriented V2X communications have recently been proposed to address these scalability challenges by focusing on the content of the transmitted messages, particularly on its relevance to the intended receivers. In this paper, we numerically demonstrate that semantic and task-oriented V2X communications can substantially improve the scalability of V2X networks, increasing by up to a 4.1x factor the number of supported vehicles under high-density conditions. In addition, we show that semantic and task-oriented V2X communications can also decrease the inter-reception time between consecutive messages by up to 67% and lead to a twofold increase in the probability of successfully delivering all required relevant information to the intended receivers.

</details>


### [387] [Just-in-time Restoration with Distributed Fiber Sensing in Metropolitan Optical Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09533)
*Sleman Mouammar,Italo B. Brasileiro,Andre C. Drummond*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文研究基于分布式光纤传感（DFS）的预测信息在全光网络中实现即时恢复的有效性。仿真表明，15ms预测能力的DFS可将电路中断减少90%以上，并以较少频谱资源实现接近保护方案的服务连续性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统光网络依赖保护方案（资源密集）或故障后恢复（导致服务中断），缺乏基于分布式光纤传感预测的即时恢复机制研究，尤其在全光网络场景下考虑不同传感设备能力的影响。

Method: 利用分布式光纤传感获取光背向散射信号预测故障事件，在全光网络（无光放大器）中评估不同传感设备能力下的即时恢复性能，通过仿真分析关键指标。

Result: 预测时间能力为15ms的DFS可实现即时恢复，电路中断减少超过90%；在服务连续性上接近资源密集的保护方案，但频谱资源消耗大幅降低。

Conclusion: 基于DFS的即时恢复在全光网络中可行且高效，能以较低资源开销实现接近保护方案的服务连续性，适合作为资源高效的新型恢复策略。

Abstract: Distributed Fiber Sensing (DFS) leverages optical backscattering signals to predict failure events and enable just-in-time restoration in metropolitan optical networks, i.e., without optical amplifiers. In this paper, we study the effectiveness of proactive restoration based on DFS information in all-optical networks, while considering different sensing devices' capabilities. We evaluate whether restoration can be provisioned just-in-time before a failure happens, and its impact on key performance metrics, including the number of affected and suspended optical circuits, bandwidth blocking rate, and service downtime. Simulation results demonstrate that just-in-time restoration enabled by DFS with a prediction time capability of 15~ms can reduce circuit disruptions by more than 90\% compared to restoration without sensing and ensure optical service continuity in optical networks comparable to resource-intensive protection schemes, at a fraction of the spectral resources.

</details>


### [388] [STEPS: Semantic-Contract-Guided Scheduling for LLM-Assisted Natural-Language-Driven Edge AI Services](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09537)
*Houyi Qi,Minghui Liwang,Xianbin Wang,Seyyedali Hosseinalipour*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 提出STEPS框架，通过语义契约将用户自然语言意图转化为可执行的边缘调度决策，利用LLM解析语义并构建势博弈模型，在保证收敛性和稳定性的同时提升语义契约履行率并降低服务损失。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有边缘调度框架假设需求以数值约束（延迟、能耗、成本）给出，但用户常以模糊自然语言表达期望，导致用户意图与资源约束调度之间存在语义鸿沟。

Method: 1) LLM辅助语义解析器将用户自然语言提取为服务水平与置信度，转化为服务偏好、履行边界和语义不确定性；2) 将边缘调度建模为契约引导的势博弈，联合优化执行节点选择、计算资源分配和带宽分配；3) 构建语义请求漂移、履行漂移、履行压力和准入压力等反馈信号，动态调整语义准入、契约保守性和边缘协调。

Result: 实验表明STEPS能提升语义契约履行率、降低契约引导的服务损失，并在模糊请求和非平稳边缘环境下保持鲁棒的自适应能力。

Conclusion: 通过语义契约弥合自然语言意图与边缘资源调度之间的鸿沟，势博弈框架保证了均衡的存在性与收敛稳定性，为LLM辅助的边缘AI服务调度提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Networked AI services are increasingly delivered through edge infrastructures to support latency-sensitive applications. Edge scheduling is critical for deciding where and how AI services are executed under limited communication and computing resources. Existing frameworks usually assume that requirements are given as numerical constraints, such as latency bounds, energy budgets, or cost limits. In practice, users often express expectations through ambiguous natural language, creating a gap between user intent and resource constrained scheduling. To bridge this gap, we propose semantic-contract-guided edge potential scheduling (STEPS), a natural language driven scheduling framework for LLM assisted edge AI services. STEPS introduces semantic contracts as executable interfaces between user-side semantics and edge-side decision making. An LLM assisted semantic parser extracts service levels and confidence scores, which are converted into service preferences, fulfillment bounds, and semantic uncertainty. Based on these contracts, STEPS formulates edge scheduling as a contract-guided potential game that jointly determines execution-node selection, computing-resource provisioning, and bandwidth allocation. It also builds feedback signals from semantic request drift, fulfillment drift, fulfillment pressure, and admission pressure to adjust semantic admission, contract conservativeness, and edge coordination. We characterize the exact potential game structure, establish pure strategy Nash equilibrium existence, and prove convergence and stability properties. Experiments show that STEPS improves semantic contract fulfillment, reduces contract guided service loss, and maintains robust adaptation under ambiguous requests and non-stationary edge environments.

</details>


### [389] [Strict-Priority Packet Delay in Switches with Transmit-Ring Buffering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09619)
*Yash Deshpande,Quirin Vogel,Wolfgang Kellerer*

Main category: cs.NI

TL;DR: 本文指出现有SP调度延迟模型忽略了交换机的发送环（TXR）实现细节，导致高优先级（HP）数据包的延迟被低估；作者扩展了标准SP延迟模型以包含TXR，通过多台交换机测量验证，并提供了一种估算TXR大小的方法，使模型更贴近实际交换机行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有SP调度模型（确定性及随机性）均忽略了交换机中发送环（TXR）这一实现细节——调度器与物理端口之间的缓冲区。由于交换机需在当前包传输完成前准备下一包，TXR中已放置的包会进一步延迟高优先级（HP）包，改变其最坏延迟和逐跳延迟分布。现有模型存在此建模空白。

Method: 1. 识别并指出TXR这一被忽视的建模缺口；2. 将TXR纳入标准SP延迟模型进行扩展；3. 在多个交换机上通过实测验证修正后的模型；4. 提出一种测量方法来估算TXR大小（该参数通常不在交换机数据表中报告）。

Result: 修正后的模型相较于原有模型更贴近实际交换机行为，能够更准确地刻画HP包的最坏延迟和延迟分布。通过多台交换机测量验证了模型有效性，且提出的TXR大小估算方法可实用。

Conclusion: 对于使用SP调度且需要延迟边界或延迟分布的系统，本文提出的包含TXR的模型是更准确的交换机行为表示。填补了理论模型与硬件实现之间的关键差距。

Abstract: Strict Priority (SP) scheduling is widely used at switch egress to provide low-latency service to high-priority (HP) traffic. Existing deterministic and stochastic latency models typically account for scheduler behavior and packet transmission, but omit a common switch implementation detail: the transmit ring (TXR) between the scheduler and the physical port. Because the switch must prepare the next packet before the current transmission completes, packets already placed in the TXR can further delay HP packets. This changes both the worst-case delay and the per-hop delay distribution of HP packets. This paper identifies this modeling gap, extends standard SP latency models to include the TXR, and validates the revised model through measurements on multiple switches. It also provides a measurement method for estimating the TXR size, a parameter that is often not reported in switch datasheets. The resulting model provides a closer representation of switch behavior for systems that use SP scheduling and require either delay bounds or delay distributions.

</details>


<div id='cs.SE'></div>

# cs.SE [[Back]](#toc)

### [390] [Systematic LLM Translation of Legacy Scientific Code to Differentiable Frameworks: Application to a Land Surface Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07681)
*Aya Lahlou,Linnia Hawkins,Pierre Gentine*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出一个五阶段LLM智能体流水线，将遗留Fortran代码（19,000行陆地表面模型）自动翻译为可微分的JAX代码，实现完整的雅可比矩阵计算、梯度优化加速（8倍步数减少）和24倍墙钟加速（集成规模N=2,048）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 可微分编程在科学建模中潜力巨大，但将遗留代码（尤其是Fortran）迁移到可微分框架非常困难，现有方法缺乏自动化、可扩展的解决方案。

Method: 五阶段LLM智能体流水线：（1）静态依赖分析，确定模块翻译顺序；（2）迭代编译-修复循环，自动纠错；（3）Fortran参考预言机，在模块级别强制执行数值一致性后再进行集成和梯度验证。实例化在CLM-ml-v2（19,000行Fortran）上，评估73个模块翻译任务。

Result: 翻译后的模型单次反向传播计算完整雅可比矩阵；梯度优化较无梯度方法减少8倍步数；在N=2,048集成规模下实现24倍墙钟加速。模型与流水线基础设施已开源。

Conclusion: 该方法证明了LLM智能体流水线可以有效自动化遗留科学代码到可微分框架的迁移，为地球系统模型等其他组件的可微分改造提供了可复用的框架。

Abstract: Differentiable programming offers transformative capabilities for scientific modeling, enabling gradient-based parameter estimation, sensitivity analysis, and data assimilation. Yet, migrating legacy codebases into differentiable frameworks remains a challenge. We present a five-phase LLM-based agentic pipeline that translates legacy Fortran into JAX: static dependency analysis determines module translation order from the full call graph; iterative compile-repair loops correct errors autonomously; and a Fortran reference oracle enforces numerical parity at the module level before integration and gradient verification. We instantiate and evaluate the pipeline on CLM-ml-v2, a 19,000-line Fortran land surface model, and analyze agent behavior across 73 module translation tasks. The resulting differentiable model computes the complete Jacobian in a single backward pass, recovers physical parameters in eight times fewer steps than gradient-free optimization, and achieves a 24 times wall-clock speedup over sequential Fortran at ensemble size N=2,048. Both the translated model and pipeline infrastructure are released as a reusable framework for differentiating other Earth system model components.

</details>


### [391] [SWE-Marathon: Can Agents Autonomously Complete Ultra-Long-Horizon Software Work?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07682)
*Rishi Desai,Jesse Hu,Joan Cabezas,Neel Harsola,Pratyush Shukla,Roey Ben Chaim,Adnan El Assadi,Omkaar Mukund Kamath,Fenil Faldu,Prannay Hebbar,Jiankai Sun,Yiyuan Li,Pramod Srinivasan,Ishan Gupta,Christopher Settles,Daniel Wang,Derek Chen,Pranav Raja,Albert Liu,Marek Šuppa,Nevasini Sasikumar,Luyang Kong,Erik Quintanilla,Xiangyi Li,Ivan Bercovich,Steven Dillmann*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: SWE-Marathon是一个包含20个长 horizon 任务的基准测试，每个任务平均需要2720万token完成。当前最先进的编码智能体成功率不足30%，主要失败原因包括自我验证能力差、错误报告不可行性和过早终止，且有13.8%的轨迹出现奖励黑客行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有智能体基准测试大多评估短任务（如单个PR、小工单或5-10分钟的练习），无法衡量智能体在规划、长上下文理解和记忆使用方面的能力，因此需要长 horizon 任务的基准测试。

Method: 构建20个长 horizon 任务，涵盖软件工程及相关技术领域；每个任务包含独特的可执行环境、人工编写的参考解决方案和多层验证套件；引入对抗性审查测试套件和执行环境，以及多层检查机制防止捷径解法。

Result: 当前前沿编码智能体解决率低于30%；13.8%的轨迹出现奖励黑客行为；平均每个智能体尝试消耗2720万token。

Conclusion: 现有智能体在长 horizon 任务上表现不佳，SWE-Marathon为评估智能体的长期规划、记忆和推理能力提供了更有挑战性的基准。

Abstract: AI agents are increasingly expected to complete long-horizon workflows that require sustained progress over hours, millions of tokens, and complex environments. Yet current agent benchmarks largely evaluate short-form tasks, such as single pull requests, small tickets, or 5-10 minute exercises, limiting our ability to measure agents' capabilities in planning, long-context understanding, and memory use. We introduce SWE-Marathon, a benchmark of 20 long-horizon tasks spanning software engineering and adjacent technical domains. Each task consists of a unique executable environment, a human-written reference solution, and a multi-layer verification suite. Logged agent attempts average 27.2M total tokens, making SWE-Marathon substantially longer-horizon than existing SWE and command-line agent benchmarks. Current frontier coding agents solve fewer than 30% of tasks. Failures often arise from poor self-verification, self-reported infeasibility, and premature termination. We also observe reward-hacking behavior in 13.8% of rollouts, where agents attempt to exploit the environment or verifier to bypass the intended workflow. SWE-Marathon includes adversarial review of test suites and execution environments, as well as multi-layer checks designed to prevent shortcut solutions. We release SWE-Marathon, evaluation code, and agent trajectories at https://swe-marathon.org/.

</details>


### [392] [Review the Code, Not the Story: A Vision and Protocol for Code-First Peer Review](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07683)
*Jienan Chen*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出"代码优先同行评审"范式：作者提交可执行研究工件和声明清单，由AI系统自动构建环境、执行实验、审计代码并生成标准化评审包，将评审焦点从叙事文本转向可执行证据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前计算领域同行评审以作者手稿为中心，但关键证据存在于代码、数据、配置和实验流程中。手稿优先的工作流赋予作者过大的叙事控制权，而评审员缺乏时间检查实现细节、复现结果或检测无依据的声明。

Method: 提出代码优先评审协议：作者提交可执行研究工件+声明清单；由AI系统自动构建环境、执行实验、审计代码路径、将声明映射至证据，生成标准化评审包。形式化定义"声明-证据契约"、生成评审视图和评审包抽象层，并给出工作示例和系统架构。

Result: 提出了完整的代码优先评审框架，包括形式化定义、系统架构和工作示例，并分析了AI偏见、提示注入、模型不稳定性、可审计性和作者上诉等评估与治理挑战。

Conclusion: AI应作为评审基础设施而非替代评审者或自动写作助手，将同行评审目标从润色叙事转向可执行证据，实现更可靠、可复现的学术评审流程。

Abstract: Peer review in computational fields remains centered on author-written manuscripts, even though the decisive evidence for many claims resides in executable code, data, configurations, and experiment pipelines. This manuscript-first workflow gives authors substantial control over narrative framing while leaving reviewers with limited time to inspect implementation details, reproduce results, or detect unsupported claims. This vision and protocol paper proposes code-first peer review: authors submit executable research artifacts and minimal claim manifests; a venue-controlled AI system builds the environment, executes experiments, audits code paths, maps claims to evidence, and generates a standardized Review Package for human reviewers. The goal is not to replace reviewers or to give authors an automatic writing assistant. Instead, AI serves as review infrastructure that shifts the target of peer review from polished narratives to executable evidence. We formalize a claim-evidence contract, define the Generated Review View and Review Package abstractions, give a worked example, outline a system architecture, and analyze evaluation and governance challenges including AI bias, prompt injection, model instability, auditability, and author appeal.

</details>


### [393] [Are We Lost in the Woods? Detecting Silent Semantic Faults for Random Forest Classifiers with Data-informed Static Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07709)
*Willem Meijer,Louis Ohl,Kristian Sandahl,Daniel Varro*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出了一种数据驱动的静态分析技术 dille，通过将ML管道转化为有向无环图并依据API契约进行检测，能在亚秒级内以91%的精度识别随机森林分类器脚本中的静默语义故障（如数据不平衡），且无需访问原始数据集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ML工程师常遇到静默语义故障（如数据集不平衡），这些故障无明显症状但会降低模型性能，且通常只有在昂贵的训练完成后才能被发现，造成资源浪费。现有方法缺乏在不执行代码的情况下提前检测这类故障的能力。

Method: 将ML脚本中的管道提取为有向无环图（DAG），并基于形式化的API契约（涵盖结构、数据和超参数）进行静态分析；利用聚合后的数据属性进行检测，从而在数据集因保密限制不可访问时仍能工作。

Result: 在真实Kaggle笔记本上评估，dille工具识别相关语义故障的精度达91%，运行时开销在亚秒级别；实证研究发现12%到18%的现有随机森林ML笔记本受静默语义故障影响。

Conclusion: 数据驱动的静态分析能有效降低ML调试负担，适合集成到IDE、智能体工作流和CI/CD管道中，具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: While machine learning (ML) software necessitates effective quality assurance, ML engineers still encounter silent semantic faults, such as imbalanced datasets, that degrade prediction performance without apparent symptoms. These faults are typically detected after expensive training cycles, causing significant resource waste. We propose a data-informed static analysis technique to detect silent semantic faults in ML scripts that use the popular random forest classifier. Our approach extracts ML pipelines into directed acyclic graphs and evaluates them against formalized API contracts to detect structural, data, and hyperparameter faults. Our analysis uses aggregated data properties, enabling fault detection even when datasets are inaccessible due to confidentiality restrictions. We implemented this technique in an open-source tool, dille, and evaluated it on real-world Kaggle notebooks that use the random forest classifier. Our results demonstrate that the tool identifies relevant semantic faults with 91% precision and sub-second runtime overhead, making it suitable for integration into integrated development environments, agentic workflows, and continuous integration pipelines. Our empirical study reveals that 12% to 18% of existing ML notebooks that use the random forest classifier are affected by silent semantic faults, highlighting the immediate practical utility of data-informed static analysis in reducing the burden of ML debugging.

</details>


### [394] [The Windows IOCTL Census: A Corpus-Scale, Multi-Architecture Database of the Driver Control-Code Surface](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07732)
*Michael J. Bommarito*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文构建了Windows IOCTL调度表面的映射数据库（Windows IOCTL Census），覆盖27,087个已签名驱动，通过确定性、架构中立的方法恢复调度表面，并利用LLM对可处理程序进行优先级排序。数据库作为公共数据集发布，包含数千万行数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究虽有针对IOCTL攻击面的扫描工具和已知恶意驱动列表，但缺乏对整个调度表面的系统性映射，导致对该攻击面的整体认知不足。

Method: 采用确定性、架构中立的一次性分析（无需符号执行），通过读取提升后的中间表示来恢复调度表面；在64位基础上增加处理程序可达性、污点分析和调用图；利用LLM对可达处理程序进行排序。

Result: 成功覆盖80%的语料库（跨x86和x64），包括现有扫描器无法处理的32位部分；生成包含27,087个二进制、310万解码控制码、818万函数、1595万调用边的数据集。

Conclusion: Windows IOCTL Census作为首个系统性的IOCTL调度表面地图，填补了该领域空白，为安全研究提供了大规模、可查询的基础数据集。

Abstract: A Windows driver exposes its kernel through I/O control (IOCTL) codes, and a single unchecked length on the buffer behind one turns an unprivileged call into a kernel write. The research community has strong scanners for this surface and a curated list of known-bad drivers, but no map of the surface itself. We build that map. The Windows IOCTL Census is a queryable database of the control-code dispatch surface of 27,087 signed Windows drivers, recovered by one deterministic, architecture-neutral pass with no symbolic execution. Reading a lifted intermediate representation instead of running a symbolic engine lets it recover a dispatch surface for 80% of the corpus across x86 and x64, including the 32-bit half existing scanners abort on. On the 64-bit lane it adds handler reachability, taint, and the call graph. An LLM ranks the reachable handlers for triage. We release the census as a public dataset of tens of millions of rows: 27,087 binaries, 3.1M decoded control codes, 8.18M functions, and 15.95M call edges.

</details>


### [395] [Sensitivity Analysis White Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07809)
*Nate Bade,Lindsay Erickson*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文系统梳理了仿真建模中的灵敏度分析方法，将其分类为局部/全局方法、方差分解、筛选法、导数法及不确定性量化工具，并关联到因子优先排序、固定、方差缩减等分析目标，同时引入灵敏度审计作为补充视角，强调模型使用的透明性与责任性，重点关注军事应用场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 灵敏度分析在基于仿真的决策支持中至关重要，但现有文献庞杂分散，缺乏统一的框架来指导复杂仿真场景（尤其是军事应用）中的方法选择与实践应用。

Method: 通过系统综述的方式，将灵敏度分析方法划分为五大类（局部/全局方法、方差基方法、筛选法、导数基方法、不确定性量化工具），并将它们映射到四个核心分析目标（因子优先排序、因子固定、方差缩减、因子映射），同时引入了灵敏度审计作为补充视角。

Result: 构建了一个连贯的灵敏度分析框架，清晰展示了不同方法与其适用分析目标之间的对应关系，并指出了灵敏度审计在保障模型透明度、假设追溯和负责任使用方面的重要作用。

Conclusion: 该框架有助于指导复杂仿真场景（尤其是军事决策支持）中灵敏度分析方法的选择与应用，同时强调了在决策相关场景中纳入灵敏度审计以确保模型使用的透明性和责任性。

Abstract: Sensitivity analysis is an important component of simulation-based decision support because it helps analysts determine which inputs most strongly influence model outcomes under uncertainty. This paper organizes the broad sensitivity analysis literature into a coherent framework for use in complex simulation settings, with particular attention to military applications. We review major classes of methods, including local and global approaches, variance-based techniques, screening methods, derivative-based methods, and uncertainty quantification tools, and relate them to common analytical objectives such as factor prioritization, factor fixing, variance reduction, and factor mapping. The paper also discusses sensitivity auditing as a complementary perspective that emphasizes transparency, assumption tracking, and responsible use of models in decision-relevant settings.

</details>


### [396] [Jas: AI-Paired Engineering as a Revival of N-Version Programming](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07828)
*Jason Hickey*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 一位开发者在约120个晚间小时内，借助AI配对编程和两项安全措施（精确的YAML规范作为唯一真相来源，并行实现作为内置差分测试层），成功构建了横跨Rust、Swift、OCaml、Python和浏览器平台的五个矢量插图应用端口。共享23,000行规范，各端口原生代码0-95,000行不等。该方法被视为1980年代因成本被放弃的N版本编程的复兴。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索AI配对编程能否使原本需要多个开发者年工作量的大型软件开发变得可行，并解决AI生成代码缺乏可靠性的问题。

Method: AI辅助实现 + 两个安全措施：(1) 精确可执行的YAML规范作为唯一真相来源；(2) 并行实现作为内置差分测试层，类似N版本编程的复兴。

Result: 五个工作端口，共享23,000行规范，各端口原生代码量从0到约95,000行不等，由单一开发者在约120个晚间小时内完成。

Conclusion: AI配对工程结合两项安全措施，能使原本需要多开发者年的大规模工作在单开发者较短时间内完成，并复兴了因成本而被放弃的N版本编程方法。

Abstract: I report a case study in AI-paired software engineering: five working ports of a vector illustration application across Rust, Swift, OCaml, Python, and browser-based platforms, built by a single developer in approximately 120 evening hours. The methodology pairs AI-assisted implementation with two safeguards -- a precise executable YAML specification serving as the single source of truth, and parallel implementations functioning as a built-in differential-testing layer. The five ports share a 23{,}000-line specification; per-port native code ranges from 0 to roughly 95{,}000 lines, reflecting the specification's escape hatch. I argue that AI-paired engineering, conditional on these two safeguards, makes feasible scope of work that conventionally requires multiple developer-years, and frame the methodology as a revival of N-version programming, a 1980s approach abandoned on cost grounds that AI changes. The paper reports concrete artifacts and honest limitations of the single-developer case study.

</details>


### [397] [Academic Integrity and Emotional Responses to Inappropriate LLM Use in Software Engineering Education](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07830)
*Ronnie de Souza Santos,Italo Santos,Giuseppe Destefanis,Cleyton Magalhaes,Mairieli Wessel*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本研究调查了116名软件工程本科生在学术不端使用LLM后的情绪反应，发现情感反应异质，最常见的是漠然，其次是内疚/焦虑和宽慰/满足，这些情绪与道德不适、处罚担忧和截止日期压力等因素相关。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在LLM日益普及的软件工程教育中，学术诚信边界变得模糊，但学生使用LLM后感知到学术不端时的情感体验尚未被充分研究。

Method: 对116名软件工程本科生进行横断面调查，收集他们在感知到学术不端使用LLM后的情绪描述。

Result: 情绪反应呈异质性：漠然最常见（即使学生意识到学习和学术地位风险）；内疚和焦虑与道德不适及处罚担忧相关；宽慰和满足主要出现在截止日期压力和不明确指导情境中。

Conclusion: 学生对LLM学术不端使用的情绪反应复杂多样，仅靠惩罚威慑可能不足，需结合道德教育与明确指导来应对。

Abstract: Academic integrity in higher education is increasingly shaped by complex socio-technical environments marked by automated tools, evolving institutional practices, and heightened performance pressures. Within this context, large language models (LLMs) are becoming prevalent in software engineering education, further blurring boundaries around acceptable assistance and authorship. This study investigates how software engineering students describe their emotional experiences after using LLMs in ways they perceive as academically inappropriate. We conducted a cross-sectional survey with 116 undergraduate students. Results show emotionally heterogeneous responses. Indifference was most frequent, including among students who recognized risks to learning and academic standing. Guilt and anxiety were reported in relation to moral discomfort and concern about penalties. Relief and satisfaction were evident primarily in deadline-driven contexts and situations of unclear guidance.

</details>


### [398] [SLRMentor: An LLM-Based Tool Supporting Learning of SLR in Software Engineering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07831)
*Rodolfo Gil-Pereira,Ronnie de Souza Santos,Cleyton Magalahes,Italo Santos*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: SLRMentor是一个对话式助手，帮助软件工程领域的研究者学习系统性文献综述流程并执行规划活动，初步验证表明它能降低新手入门门槛并支持学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 系统性文献综述（SLR）对新手研究者来说学习曲线陡峭，缺乏交互式工具来同时支持方法论学习和规划执行。

Method: 开发了基于对话的SLR助手SLRMentor，提供通用SLR指南，支持搜索字符串构建、纳排标准推理等关键规划任务，并基于已有SLR指南进行解释。

Result: 研究生初步验证表明，SLRMentor有助于澄清SLR流程和规划决策，降低新手研究者的初始障碍，同时仍需要研究者主动进行方法学判断。

Conclusion: SLRMentor能有效支持SLR学习与规划，但不会替代研究者的方法学判断，适合作为辅助工具。

Abstract: This paper presents SLRMentor, a conversational assistant designed to support both learning about the systematic literature review process and the execution of planning activities in software engineering. The tool offers general guidance on SLR methodology and supports key planning tasks, including search string construction and reasoning about inclusion and exclusion criteria, with explanations grounded in established SLR guidelines. A pilot validation with graduate students suggests that SLRMentor helps clarify the SLR process and planning decisions, lowers initial barriers for novice researchers, and supports learning while still requiring active methodological judgment.

</details>


### [399] [Cherry-pick Override: Unsafe Directional Commitment in LLM Judges under Mixed Evidence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07834)
*Haoran Xu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: LLM裁判在混合证据下会产生"Cherry-pick Override (CCO)"失败——当模式允许"矛盾"时，却输出有方向性的"支持/反驳"。研究发现，单通道修复（类型词汇、面板聚合、置信度阈值、验证器过滤）各有残留缺陷，提出双通道参考探针和外部承诺控制层作为解决方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM作为裁判时，面对既包含支持又包含反驳来源的混合证据，会错误地做出有方向性的承诺（支持或反驳），而忽略"矛盾"这一无方向性判定选项。这种"Cherry-pick Override"行为存在安全隐患。

Method: 在AVerTiC和VitaminC数据集上定义CCO协议，使用同分母诊断协议、匹配覆盖bootstrap和随机否决零假设进行测试。比较三种单通道修复（类型词汇、面板聚合、置信度阈值、验证器过滤），并设计双通道参考探针。

Result: 三选项裁判在84%以上的混合证据上返回方向性判定；多数投票放大方向性偏向但不一致；面板聚合抑制了48%的CCO中个人裁判的"矛盾"异议；置信度校准良好无法区分CCO；验证器过滤使纯证据准确率减半。双通道探针在方向性提升上显著优于单通道。

Conclusion: 仅靠单通道修复无法解决CCO问题，需要外部承诺控制层，将证据结构与置信度作为正交通道分离，并以NO-COMMIT作为路由控制状态。

Abstract: LLM judges increasingly turn verdicts into system commitments. Under mixed evidence (claims with both supporting and refuting sources) this is unsafe: when the schema exposes CONFLICTING as the authorized non-directional verdict, returning SUPPORTS/REFUTES is an unauthorized directional commitment, a failure we name Cherry-pick Override (CCO). We define CCO under an explicit task contract and report it with a same-denominator diagnostic protocol paired with matched-coverage bootstrap and an apples-to-apples random-veto null. On AVeriTeC's Conflicting subset (N_C = 150), three-option judges return a directional verdict on more than 84% of mixed-evidence claims; under the typed schema, three-judge majority voting amplifies direction-on-conflict on AVeriTeC (0.887 vs. 0.840; 95% CI [+0.013, +0.080]) but does not replicate on VitaminC-Mixed. Walking an intervention ladder of common single-channel fixes (typed vocabulary, panel aggregation, confidence thresholding, validator-only filtering), each leaves a distinct residual failure: panel aggregation suppresses single-judge CONFLICTING dissent in 48% of CCO cases; the panel is well-calibrated for direction (ECE = 0.07 on pure-S/R) so confidence cannot operationally separate CCO from correct directional commits; validator-as-classifier nearly halves pure-evidence accuracy. A minimal two-channel reference probe reaches operating points neither single channel reaches; under the random-veto null its promotion to CONFLICTING is structurally targeted on AVeriTeC (empirical p < 1/2001) and weaker but in the same direction on VitaminC-Mixed, a selectivity result rather than a magnitude one. We argue for an external commitment-control layer that separates verdict generation from commitment authorization, using structural evidence and confidence as orthogonal channels and NO-COMMIT as a routed controller state.

</details>


### [400] [A Preliminary Model for Managing Technical Debt in an Agile Environment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07859)
*Pedro E. Colla*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文为敏捷环境中的非自愿技术债务管理提出了一个初步模型，该模型整合了待办事项、债务、速度和经济价值之间的动态关系，并通过动态策略在新增开发与修复之间取得平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有技术债务管理缺乏一个集成模型来同时考虑待办事项、债务、开发速度和经济价值之间的动态关系，且传统修复策略忽视了跨期价值决策的局限性。

Method: 提出一个动态策略模型，区分功能性债务与缺陷债务，将生产率下降视为技术债务利息，推导出朴素最大修复策略并指出其局限，然后提出平衡新增开发与修复的动态策略，纳入递减边际价值结构，并扩展到离散异质项。通过敏感性分析和蒙特卡洛模拟进行探索性验证。

Result: 敏感性分析和蒙特卡洛模拟显示模型行为与经济直觉一致，验证了模型的有效性。同时明确了模型的局限性：宏观性质、依赖组织稳定参数、假设跨期理性以及要求故事间弱耦合。

Conclusion: 该模型为敏捷环境中的技术债务管理提供了一个经济视角的分析框架，但受限于宏观假设和特定的组织条件，需要在实际应用时谨慎考虑其边界条件。

Abstract: This paper presents a preliminary model for managing involuntary technical debt in agile environments by formulating, in an integrated way, the dynamics among backlog, debt, velocity, and economic value. The work distinguishes initiated but unfinished functional debt from a simple defect back log and from rework, interprets productivity degradation as technical-debt interest, and derives the naive maximum-remediation policy in order to show its limitations against an intertemporal value-based decision. On this basis, a dynamic policy uk is proposed to balance new development and remediation; a decreasing marginal-value structure is incorporated; and the model is extended to discrete, inhomogeneous items. Exploratory validation through sensitivity analysis and MonteCarlo simulation shows behavior consistent with the economic intuition of the model. Finally, the limits of the formulation are made explicit: its macroscopic nature, its dependence on organizationally stable parameters, its assumption of intertemporal rationality, and its requirement of weak coupling among stories.

</details>


### [401] [DD-GEPA: Prompt Optimization for Dialogue Disentanglement Focusing on Task Instruction and Utterance Representation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.07894)
*Naoki Takada,Tatsunori Mori*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于大语言模型（LLM）的自动提示优化方法，用于解决多轮对话中的对话解缠问题。该方法将提示分解为任务指令、话语表示和输出指令三个部分，并使用GEPA优化方法进行自动优化。实验证明，优化后的提示在对话解缠准确率上优于原始提示，甚至超越了人工设计的提示。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多轮对话中常存在对话交织的问题，即多个参与者在同一时间讨论不同话题。对话解缠旨在将混乱的话语序列分离成连贯的对话。尽管LLM在此任务上有潜力，但仍存在准确率低的问题。因此，本文希望自动化优化提示以提升LLM的解缠能力。

Method: 将提示分解为三个组件：任务指令（task instruction）、话语表示（utterance representation）和输出指令（output instruction）。采用GEPA（一种针对复合AI系统的优化方法）对这些组件进行自动优化，以提升LLM在对话解缠任务上的表现。

Result: 在基准数据集上的实验表明，优化后的提示在对话解缠准确率上优于原始提示，并且能够超越人工设计的提示。

Conclusion: 自动提示优化是一种有效的提升LLM在对话解缠任务上性能的方法，能够自动生成比人工设计更优的提示，展示了自动化优化在复杂自然语言处理任务中的应用潜力。

Abstract: Multi-party chat often contains interleaved dialogues because multiple participants can discuss different topics at the same time. Dialogue disentanglement addresses this problem by separating an entangled utterance sequence into coherent dialogues. While large language models (LLMs) are promising for this task, they still struggle with dialogue disentanglement and achieve low accuracy. This paper proposes an automatic prompt optimization for LLM based dialogue disentanglement. We decompose the prompt into three components: task instruction, utterance representation, and output instruction, and optimize them using GEPA, an optimization method for compound AI systems. Experiments on benchmark datasets show that the optimized prompts improve dialogue disentanglement accuracy over the original prompts and can surpass hand crafted prompts.

</details>


### [402] [Autonomous Incident Resolution at Hyperscale: An Agentic AI Architecture for Network Operations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.09122)
*Arun Malik*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于超大规模云网络基础设施的自主AI代理架构，通过多代理协作框架实现网络事件的自动检测、诊断和修复，在生产部署中实现了超过90%的常见事件自主解决率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 超大规模云网络的运营面临事件数量庞大、发生速度快、故障复杂度高的挑战，传统人工事件响应方式已无法满足需求。

Method: 采用多代理编排框架，包含分层代理分解、基于技能的标准协议工具调用、从运营手册中编码的结构化知识、带有安全边界的渐进式自主、以及闭环验证等架构原则。

Result: 在主流云提供商的生产环境中部署，常见事件类别的自主解决率超过90%，同时通过分层授权和回滚机制保障安全。

Conclusion: 自主AI代理系统能够在保证安全的前提下高效处理大规模网络运营中的常见事件，论文还讨论了设计权衡、故障模式以及规模运营的经验教训。

Abstract: Cloud network infrastructure at hyperscale presents unique operational challenges where traditional human-driven incident response cannot keep pace with the volume, velocity, and complexity of failures. This paper presents an agentic AI architecture for autonomous incident resolution in large-scale network operations. Our system employs a multi-agent orchestration framework where specialized AI agents collaborate to detect, diagnose, and remediate network incidents without human intervention. We describe the architectural principles, including hierarchical agent decomposition, skills-based tool invocation via standardized protocols, structured knowledge encoding from operational runbooks, progressive autonomy with safety boundaries, and closed-loop verification. The architecture has been deployed in production at a major cloud provider, demonstrating that agentic AI systems can achieve autonomous resolution rates exceeding 90% for common incident categories while maintaining safety guarantees through layered authorization and rollback mechanisms. We discuss design tradeoffs, failure modes, and lessons learned from operating autonomous AI agents at scale.

</details>


### [403] [Identifying unique developers in OSS projects: A family of models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08096)
*Ruoyu Su,Alexander Bakhtin,Matteo Esposito,Davide Taibi,Valentina Lenarduzzi*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 针对开源开发者身份去重问题，构建了基于LLM辅助标注的大规模数据集，并系统比较了多种ML模型在精度与计算开销间的权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开源软件中同一开发者可能使用多个别名（姓名/邮箱），导致组织和逻辑耦合度量失真，现有方法缺少可靠的去重处理。

Method: 以Indel相似度为基线，利用LLM辅助匹配+人工验证构建大规模重复身份数据集，在此基础上训练并比较不同复杂度的经典ML模型，评估精度、训练/推理时间及能耗。

Result: 构建了高质量的去重数据集，并提供了不同方法在精度与计算成本之间的权衡基准。

Conclusion: 为大规模开源挖掘场景下选择开发者去重模型提供了指导，明确了不同方案在准确性与开销之间的最优折衷。

Abstract: Organizational and logical coupling metrics require reliable identification of unique developers. In OSS, commit metadata is limited to names and emails, and the same developer may appear under multiple aliases, which can distort coupling measurements if de-duplication is missing. We aim to build a scalable and accurate pipeline for OSS developer de-duplication and to provide guidance on choosing a model based on precision vs. computational effort. We use Indel similarity as a baseline, then run an LLM-assisted matching process with manual validation to create a large dataset of duplicate identities. Using this dataset, we train and compare classical ML models of different complexity, evaluating precision along with training and inference time and energy. We expect a high-quality dataset and a benchmark of approaches that clarifies which solutions offer the best trade-off between accuracy and cost for large-scale OSS mining.

</details>


### [404] [TICoder: A Repository-Level Code Generation Framework with Test-Driven Planning and Implementation-Aware Reuse](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08135)
*Siyu Nan,Yaling Luo,Jian Wang,Neng Zhang,Bing Li*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出TICoder框架，通过测试驱动的迭代规划机制和实现感知的代码复用策略，显著提升仓库级代码生成性能，平均提升11.52%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有仓库级代码生成方法在规划阶段缺乏测试驱动的行为引导，在代码复用阶段忽略实现逻辑，导致规划与期望行为不一致，复用效率低下。

Method: 1) 测试驱动的迭代规划机制：利用测试用例作为行为规范，迭代优化实现步骤；2) 实现感知的代码复用策略：通过双视角相似度（功能视角+实现视角）检索候选函数，再通过结构聚类和困惑度过滤的双阶段选择策略识别相关使用模式。

Result: 在多个仓库级代码生成基准测试上，使用多种LLM，TICoder平均超越SOTA方法11.52%。

Conclusion: TICoder验证了结合测试驱动规划和实现感知复用能有效解决仓库级代码生成中的依赖与上下文窗口限制问题，为后续研究提供了新思路。

Abstract: Repository-level code generation with Large Language Models (LLMs) remains challenging, primarily due to complex dependencies and limited context windows. Recent approaches adopt retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and the planning mechanism to reuse potential callee functions in the repository. However, these approaches often suffer from two limitations: lack of test-driven behavioral guidance during planning and overlooking the implementation logic embedded in repository code during reuse. As a result, generated plans may not align with expected behaviors, and retrieved functions may not be effectively reused. In this paper, we propose TICoder, a novel repository-level code generation framework that improves both planning and reuse. TICoder introduces a test-driven iterative planning mechanism that leverages test cases as behavioral specifications to refine implementation steps. Furthermore, TICoder employs an implementation-aware code reuse strategy, which retrieves potential callee functions using a dual-view similarity that captures both functional and implementation aspects. We then identify relevant usage patterns through a dual-stage selection strategy, combining structure-based clustering and perplexity-based filtering. We conduct extensive experiments on widely used repository-level code generation benchmarks with various LLMs. Experimental results demonstrate that TICoder outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods, achieving an average improvement of 11.52%.

</details>


### [405] [Minimum Complete MR Subsets under Semantic-Mutation Fault Models: A Support-Set Domination Boundary](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08269)
*Meng Li,Xiaohua Yang,Jie Liu,Shiyu Yan*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文研究了变质测试中MR子集选择何时是真正的突变级需求而非粗粒度的故障类计数伪影，提出了层相对完整性准则，建立了支持集支配边界，证明了Min-MR-Complete问题的NP-hardness，并给出了近似算法和精确ILP公式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有变质测试中MR子集选择常被视为粗粒度的故障类计数问题，缺乏对突变级需求的理论保证。作者希望明确区分MR-specific问题与普通故障类计数，建立严格的理论边界。

Method: 定义了层相对完整性准则（layer-relative completeness criterion），引入kill-signature异质性概念，构建故障签名核（fault-signature kernel）。将Min-MR-Complete问题形式化为Set-Cover等价问题，提出贪心近似算法和精确ILP公式，以及SMS-rank上界。

Result: 证明了支持集支配边界的存在性，阐明类级抽象何时安全、突变级MR最小化何时必要。证明了Min-MR-Complete问题的NP-hardness和经典对数近似边界。通过artefact lanes和route witnesses分别验证了边界定理的坍缩与非坍缩情况。

Conclusion: MR子集选择的突变级需求受kill-signature异质性支配，Min-MR-Complete问题本质上是Set-Cover问题，具有相应的复杂性特征。Route witness机制可用于区分边界定理的不同情况，而不应混为群体级实验。

Abstract: This paper asks when MR-subset selection is a real mutant-level requirement for minimum complete evidence in metamorphic testing rather than a coarse fault-class counting artifact. We define a layer-relative completeness criterion over an admitted mutant--draw coverage universe. The central result is a support-set domination boundary: it states when class-level abstraction is safe and when mutant-level MR minimization is necessary. The boundary is governed by kill-signature heterogeneity, which yields a scoped fault-signature kernel and separates the MR-specific question from ordinary fault-class counting. The resulting Min-MR-Complete problem is Set-Cover-equivalent over the selected coverage universe, giving NP-hardness, the classical logarithmic approximation boundary, a greedy approximation, an exact ILP formulation, and an SMS-rank upper bound that is not a lower bound or tight predictor. Artifact lanes provide lane-local minimization and audit evidence; separately, route witnesses instantiate both collapse and non-collapse regimes for the boundary theorem and are not pooled as population-level experiments. Other MR-class-proxy rows remain intermediate signals rather than route-admitted witness evidence.

</details>


### [406] [Impacts of Histories and Models on LLM Grading: A Study in Advanced Software Engineering Courses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08400)
*Qilin Zhou,Zhuo Wang,Yue Li,W. K. Chan*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本研究探讨了LLM在研究生阅读报告评分中的可靠性，发现模型评分存在内部一致性和显著的模型间不一致性，且连续交互会导致评分标准偏离人类专家评分，简单集成方法无法提升与人类评分的对齐度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究生阅读报告评分给教育者带来沉重负担，LLM虽有自动化评分的潜力，但其在该专业任务上的可靠性尚未被充分研究，尤其是评分一致性不足是教育公平的主要障碍。

Method: 提出一种人类对齐的LLM辅助评分工作流，基于180份研究生高级软件工程课程的学生报告，评估Grok和GPT两种主流LLM在评分一致性和与人类评分对齐方面的表现。

Result: LLM表现出不同水平的模型内部一致性，但存在显著的模型间评分不一致；简单集成方法无法改善与人类评估的对齐；持续的交互历史会导致模型评分标准系统性偏离人类专家评分。

Conclusion: LLM有潜力减轻教育工作者的评分负担，但不加区分地使用LLM评分可能引入系统性不公平，需要特定的操作实践来缓解这种差异。

Abstract: Graduate-level research reading report assessment creates a substantial labor burden for educators. While large language models (LLMs) hold great potential for automating academic grading, their reliability for this specialized task remains understudied, particularly regarding grading consistency, the lack of which represents a primary obstacle to educational fairness. This paper proposes a human-aligned LLM-assisted grading workflow and presents a case study based on 180 student submissions from a graduate advanced software engineering course. We evaluate two mainstream LLMs, Grok and GPT, in terms of grading consistency and alignment with human scores.
